core_claim: One sentence claim the carousel is making.

brand.font_stack: Inter, Satoshi, Space Grotesk, system-ui, sans-serif

slides.on_slide_copy: AI PHISHING MADE OLD TRAINING OBSOLETE
slides.subline: The risk is not magic. It is personalization at scale.
slides.visual_direction: Dark lower-third, realistic cyber editorial image, one cyan accent glow.
slides.visual_prompt: realistic editorial cybersecurity image, dark SOC environment, subtle cyan glow, strong negative space, no rendered text, no logos, no credentials
slides.notes: Cover headline must remain readable at thumbnail size.

slides.body: Keep this high level. Do not include payloads or operational abuse steps.
slides.visual_direction: Abstract inbox pattern with AI personalization motif; no real brands.
slides.visual_prompt: abstract phishing inbox and neural network visualization, dark cinematic, no readable email text, no logos, no credentials, lower-third space

slides.on_slide_copy: The weak point is trust, not grammar.
slides.visual_direction: Human decision point, security alert, subtle tension.
slides.visual_prompt: dark cinematic cybersecurity decision moment, analyst reviewing abstract alert, no readable text, no payloads

slides.on_slide_copy: AI scales context faster than templates.
slides.visual_prompt: abstract AI pipeline turning generic messages into personalized variants, no exploit instructions, no real domains, no text

slides.on_slide_copy: Training that depends on typos is brittle.
slides.visual_direction: Broken checklist or stale awareness module.
slides.visual_prompt: outdated cyber awareness checklist metaphor, dark editorial photo, no readable training content

slides.on_slide_copy: Train behavior, not just pattern spotting.
slides.visual_direction: Defender workflow: verify channel, report, escalate.
slides.visual_prompt: security team workflow verification scene, dark teal/cyan accent, abstract UI, no sensitive data
minimal cyber editorial background, strong negative space, subtle network texture, no text

slides.on_slide_copy: What phishing red flag do you no longer trust?
slides.subline: Save this for your next awareness review.
slides.visual_direction: Clean end card with subtle source/credibility cue.
slides.visual_prompt: dark cybersecurity end card background, soft cyan glow, clean negative space, no rendered text

caption: Short caption goes here. Use the pipeline caption style and do not add unsupported facts.
comment_prompt: What would you update in your phishing training first?
alt_text: Slide 1: Dark cyber-themed cover with headline about AI phishing changing security awareness training.
Slide 2: Context slide explaining that AI can make phishing messages feel more personal.
Slide 3: Risk slide focused on trust and decision-making rather than obvious typos.
Slide 4: Mechanism slide showing personalization at a safe, abstract level.
Slide 5: Failure point slide warning that typo-based training is brittle.
Slide 6: Defense slide encouraging behavior-based verification and reporting.
Slide 7: Takeaway slide emphasizing process discipline.
Slide 8: CTA slide asking what phishing red flag the viewer no longer trusts.

sources.supports: Which on-slide claim this source supports.

asset_licenses.notes: No rendered text, no logos, no credentials.

narration.text: Narration line for the opening beat.

beats.motion: slow push-in with subtle HUD glow
beats.caption: AI phishing made old training obsolete.

video.subtitle_style: large centered lower-third, high contrast, two lines max

music.prompt: Instrumental only, no vocals. Create a 30-second dark cyber pulse at 92 BPM.
music.target_mix: music under narration, never masking speech
